text.title: OpenAI Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) — Decision Tree

decision-tree.root-question: Is there an SFT base AND ≥500 quality pairs?

branch.when: sft_base_present == true AND pair_count >= 500 AND inter_rater_agreement >= 0.6
branch.question: How far should the model move from SFT (beta tuning)?

branch.conclusion: beta=0.05. Small KL penalty; gentle shift.
beta=0.3. Larger shift allowed; closer to RLHF behaviour.
Train SFT first or collect more pairs.

example.p: SFT base ft:gpt-4o-mini:org::sft_v1 ready, 1850 pairs, kappa 0.72, brand-voice target → beta=0.1 → DPO 2 epochs.
